entry.title: HOW CODING CAN HELP YOUR CHILD EXCEL
entry.summary:
Coding is much more than a technical skill. It allows kids to interact in new ways with their digital worlds and become makers. Learning to code has been shown to strengthen computational thinking skills, and in the process, it’s giving kids an advantage in subjects like math and writing. It also helps foster creativity and organizational skills. And when they’re making amazing projects on their own, kids feel more confident in themselves and believe in their ability to create instead of consume technology.

http://www.tynker.com/blog/articles/ideas-and-tips/how-coding-can-help-your-child-excel/
entry.content:
Coding is much more than a technical skill. It allows kids to interact in new ways with their digital worlds and become makers. Learning to code has been shown to strengthen computational thinking skills, and in the process, it’s giving kids an advantage in subjects like math and writing. It also helps foster creativity and organizational skills. And when they’re making amazing projects on their own, kids feel more confident in themselves and believe in their ability to create instead of consume technology.

http://www.tynker.com/blog/articles/ideas-and-tips/how-coding-can-help-your-child-excel/

entry.title: CREATIVE PROBLEM SOLVING LED TO MILLIONS IN SAVINGS
entry.summary: A fortune 500 insurance company proves that improving processes not only saves money in the long term, but also noticeably increases associate engagements. The company started implementing Lean principles in its Application Maintenance area three years ago. The transformation involved more than 2,000 IT engineers, requiring associates across all IT organizations to collaborate to identify opportunities for improvement, map out changes, implement them and make plans for sustainability of the changes. The transformation saves company $40 million annually. Beyond saving time and money, Lean challenges associates to use their skills to their full potential. The associates are much happier at work and more productive.
entry.content:
A fortune 500 insurance company proves that improving processes not only saves money in the long term, but also noticeably increases associate engagements. The company started implementing Lean principles in its Application Maintenance area three years ago. The transformation involved more than 2,000 IT engineers, requiring associates across all IT organizations to collaborate to identify opportunities for improvement, map out changes, implement them and make plans for sustainability of the changes. The transformation saves company $40 million annually. Beyond saving time and money, Lean challenges associates to use their skills to their full potential. The associates are much happier at work and more productive.

Want to know more about the story and Lean. contact Candi – candirai09@gmail.com

entry.title: THE TREND OF FASHION DESIGN
entry.summary:
It’s not about what you don’t know. It’s all about if you want to learn.

https://www.madewithcode.com/about/
entry.content:
It’s not about what you don’t know. It’s all about if you want to learn.

https://www.madewithcode.com/about/

entry.title: DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION
entry.summary:
Accenture 2016 global survey finds that 33% respondents believe that global economy is already impacted by digitization and 86% anticipates that the pace of technology change will increase a rapid or unprecedented rate over the next three years.

http://www.dqindia.com/how-a-liquid-workforce-will-propel-organisations-into-digital-landscape/
entry.content:
Accenture 2016 global survey finds that 33% respondents believe that global economy is already impacted by digitization and 86% anticipates that the pace of technology change will increase a rapid or unprecedented rate over the next three years.

http://www.dqindia.com/how-a-liquid-workforce-will-propel-organisations-into-digital-landscape/

entry.title: POKEMON GO – DO YOU PLAY?
entry.summary: One thing is true — you have to “walk” “outside”. Wait! That’s two good things for the nerds.
entry.content: One thing is true — you have to “walk” “outside”. Wait! That’s two good things for the nerds.
